---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
What went wrong, in one sentence.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error: '...'

## Expected vs actual
- Expected: ...
- Actual: ...

## Environment
- Browser + version: (e.g. Safari 17.4, Chrome 124)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14.4)
- PVL instance: Hetzner (`94.130.178.182`) / DESY (`landau-webapp-dev`) / local
- Commit SHA (from the footer of any export, or `git rev-parse HEAD`): ...

## Screenshots or logs
Paste browser console errors, server-side trace IDs, or screenshots if relevant.

## Triage hints
- [ ] Scientific correctness (wrong number, wrong classification, axiom violation)
- [ ] UI / UX issue
- [ ] Performance regression
- [ ] Crash / 500
- [ ] Other
